---
title: "homework 8 frania darringer"
format: html
---


```{r}
count_zeros_loop <- function(x) {
  counter <- 0
  for (i in seq_along(x)) {
    if (x[i] == 0) {
      counter <- counter + 1
    }
  }
  return(counter)
}

count_zeros_loop(c(0, 1, 0, 2, 3, 0))


count_zeros_subset <- function(x) sum(x == 0)

count_zeros_subset(c(0, 1, 0, 2, 3, 0))

rowcol_product_matrix <- function(n_rows, n_cols) {
  mat <- outer(1:n_rows, 1:n_cols, FUN = "*")
  return(mat)
}

rowcol_product_matrix(4, 5)

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

set.seed(123)

n_per_group <- 30
true_means <- c(A = 2, B = 5, C = 9)
sigma <- 1.5

df <- tibble(
  group = rep(names(true_means), each = n_per_group),
  y = c(
    rnorm(n_per_group, mean = true_means["A"], sd = sigma),
    rnorm(n_per_group, mean = true_means["B"], sd = sigma),
    rnorm(n_per_group, mean = true_means["C"], sd = sigma)
  )
)

orig_means <- df %>% group_by(group) %>% summarize(mean_y = mean(y), .groups = "drop")
orig_means


reshuffle_group_means <- function(dat) {
  dat_shuf <- dat
  dat_shuf$y <- sample(dat_shuf$y, replace = FALSE)  

  m <- tapply(dat_shuf$y, dat_shuf$group, mean)      
  m <- m[sort(names(m))]
  return(as.numeric(m))
}

reshuffle_group_means(df)


B <- 100

groups_sorted <- sort(unique(df$group))
res_mat <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = B, ncol = length(groups_sorted))
colnames(res_mat) <- paste0("mean_", groups_sorted)

for (b in 1:B) {
  res_mat[b, ] <- reshuffle_group_means(df)
}

res_df <- as.data.frame(res_mat)
res_df$replicate <- 1:B

res_df <- res_df[, c("replicate", paste0("mean_", groups_sorted))]

head(res_df)

qplot(res_df$mean_A, bins = 20, main = "reshuffled means group a", xlab = "mean a", ylab = "count")
qplot(res_df$mean_B, bins = 20, main = "reshuffled means group b", xlab = "mean b", ylab = "count")
qplot(res_df$mean_C, bins = 20, main = "reshuffled means group c", xlab = "mean c", ylab = "count")

res_long <- res_df %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("mean_"),
    names_to = "group",
    values_to = "mean_shuffled"
  ) %>%
  mutate(group = sub("^mean_", "", group))

ggplot(res_long, aes(x = mean_shuffled, fill = group)) +
  geom_histogram(position = "identity", alpha = 0.35, bins = 25) +
  geom_vline(
    data = orig_means,
    aes(xintercept = mean_y, color = group),
    linewidth = 1,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "randomization (reshuffled) group vs. original means",
    x = "group mean after reshuffle",
    y = "count",
    fill = "group"
  ) 
```
